category.scope_note: EV charger compliance comparison for Morocco export.

title.en: China-to-Algeria EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电设备进入阿尔及利亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電設備進入阿爾及利亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Algeria IANOR standards practice, CREG / Sonelgaz grid and installation context, IEC 61851 safety, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector expectations, IEC 61000 EMC evidence, OCPP interoperability, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电设备文件与阿尔及利亚IANOR标准实践、CREG / Sonelgaz电网与安装环境、IEC 61851安全、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口预期、IEC 61000电磁兼容证据、OCPP互操作以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電設備文件與阿爾及利亞IANOR標準實踐、CREG / Sonelgaz電網與安裝環境、IEC 61851安全、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口預期、IEC 61000電磁兼容證據、OCPP互操作以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基線的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, IANOR scope determination, CREG decision, Sonelgaz grid-connection approval, customs determination, electrical-installation design, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, charge-point operators, and installers should verify current Algeria conformity, import, grid-connection, IEC standard edition, and installation requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、IANOR适用范围裁定、CREG决定、Sonelgaz并网批准、海关裁定、电气安装设计或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、充电点运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行阿尔及利亚合格评定、进口、并网、IEC标准版本及安装要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、IANOR適用範圍裁定、CREG決定、Sonelgaz併網批准、海關裁定、電氣安裝設計或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、充電點運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行阿爾及利亞合格評定、進口、併網、IEC標準版本及安裝要求。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Algeria, the practical compliance gaps are IEC-route evidence and grid acceptance rather than China domestic approvals. Algeria's standards system is anchored by IANOR, while electricity regulation and grid operation involve CREG and Sonelgaz; Algeria operates a 230 V / 400 V, 50 Hz system. EV chargers should be checked against IEC 61851-1 for general conductive charging safety, IEC 61851-23 for DC stations, IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC and CCS2 for DC connectors, and IEC 61000 / IEC 61851-21-2 for EMC. China GB/T 20234 connectors are physically incompatible with IEC 62196 vehicles and infrastructure, and GB/T 27930 DC communication does not replace CCS2 / IEC communication or OCPP back-office requirements. IANOR conformity, import documentation, Sonelgaz grid coordination, and any CREG or project-owner approval must be confirmed for the specific charger and site before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电设备进入阿尔及利亚时，实务合规差距主要是IEC路径证据和电网接入确认，而不是中国国内批准。阿尔及利亚标准体系由IANOR支撑，电力监管和电网运行涉及CREG和Sonelgaz；阿尔及利亚电网为230 V / 400 V、50 Hz。充电设备应核对IEC 61851-1传导充电通用安全、IEC 61851-23直流充电站、IEC 62196交流Type 2和直流CCS2接口，以及IEC 61000 / IEC 61851-21-2电磁兼容要求。中国GB/T 20234接口与IEC 62196车辆和基础设施在物理上不兼容，GB/T 27930直流通信也不能替代CCS2 / IEC通信或OCPP后台要求。出货前必须针对具体设备和站点确认IANOR合格评定、进口文件、Sonelgaz电网协调，以及任何CREG或项目业主审批。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電設備進入阿爾及利亞時，實務合規差距主要是IEC路徑證據和電網接入確認，而不是中國國內批准。阿爾及利亞標準體系由IANOR支撐，電力監管和電網運行涉及CREG和Sonelgaz；阿爾及利亞電網為230 V / 400 V、50 Hz。充電設備應核對IEC 61851-1傳導充電通用安全、IEC 61851-23直流充電站、IEC 62196交流Type 2和直流CCS2接口，以及IEC 61000 / IEC 61851-21-2電磁兼容要求。中國GB/T 20234接口與IEC 62196車輛和基礎設施在物理上不兼容，GB/T 27930直流通訊也不能替代CCS2 / IEC通訊或OCPP後台要求。出貨前必須針對具體設備和站點確認IANOR合格評定、進口文件、Sonelgaz電網協調，以及任何CREG或項目業主審批。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
